description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a "build linux" job that uses the crystallang/crystal:0.34.0-alpine Docker image, runs "shards install --production" in before_script, then executes "shards build --release --production --static" and stores the "bin" directory as an artifact. Also add a "build macos" job that runs on runners tagged "macos", runs the same before_script, then runs "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=\"/usr/local/opt/openssl/lib/pkgconfig\" shards build --release --production" and archives the "bin" directory. In the release stage add "release linux" and "release macos" jobs that depend on their respective build jobs, extend a common release template that copies the built binary with "cp bin/fogtrack .", publishes the "fogtrack" file as an artifact, and only runs for tag pipelines.
